name.description: Name of the database to create.

bucket.description: Name of S3 bucket to save the results of the query execution.

encryption_configuration.description: Encryption key block AWS Athena uses to decrypt the data in S3.

expected_bucket_owner.description: AWS account ID that you expect to be the owner of the Amazon S3 bucket.

force_destroy.description: Whether to destroy all tables in the database when destroying the database resource.

acl_configuration.description: Should an Amazon S3 canned ACL be set to control ownership of stored query results.
